title: Hefite Fly Zapper Electric, 2-in-1 Illuminable Bug Zapper with 4200V Grid & 15W Lamp, Flies Killer for the Home, Outdoor & Indoor Use, UK Plug & Waterproof Mosquito Killers
bullet_points: 2 IN 1: Our fly zapper does both. The specialized light emits wavelengths 365–395nm, powerfully attracts and zaps mosquitoes with 4200-volt electric shock. The separate bottom LED provides ample lighting to safely illuminate your deck, porch, or garden gatherings.

Powerful & Efficient: Equipped with a powerful 4200V grid, this fly killer electric delivers a decisive zap, effectively eliminating mosquitoes, flies, moths, and gnats on contact. The 15W bug light design is powerful against pests but save the energy.

Waterproof & Wide Coverage: With a IPX4 waterproof rating, this electric fly killers for the home is built to withstand the elements. Place it confidently in your backyard, garden, or patio. Enjoy a large area of protection, covering up to 2100 square feet.

Effortless Operation: The generous power cord gives you the freedom to place your bug zapper exactly where it's needed, no matter the outlet distance. When it's time for maintenance, simply detach the bottom collection tray to dispose of insect remains—no fuss, no mess.

Safe & Silent: Reclaim your peaceful outdoor space. This fly zapper plug in operates with no noise and uses no harmful chemicals, sprays, or odors. It's a safe and effective fly killer for your family and pets, providing you with complete peace of mind.
